case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF VS MENCHAVEZ, ANNABEL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF DELINQUENT REVENUE AS TO DEFENDANT MENCHAVEZ, ANNABEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-17-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06
